message:
Fix session state bugs in REPL: reset last_selected, validate set names

Bug fixes discovered during code review:

1. Reset last_selected in run_search() - prevents $_ from referencing
   stale/invalid indices after a new search
2. Reset last_selected in run_refine() - prevents $_ from pointing to
   wrong items after indices change from filtering
3. Validate variable names in set command - prevents empty names or
   names with invalid characters (only alphanumeric + underscore allowed)

Added 4 new tests for set command validation:
- test_parse_set_empty_name_fails
- test_parse_set_invalid_chars_fails
- test_parse_set_valid_underscore_name
- test_parse_set_valid_underscore_prefix

All 92 REPL tests pass, all E2E tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
